Abstract
Conventional methods of monitoring water quality, such as chemical oxygen demand (COD), biochemical oxygen demand (BOD), and ammoniacal nitrogen (NH₃-N), are often limited by high capital costs, reagent-dependent maintenance requirements, and laboratory analysis delays.
